rules.rule_text:
rule dexter_strings
{
	meta:
		author = "Brian Wallace @botnet_hunter"
		author_email = "bwall@ballastsecurity.net"
		date = "2014-09-10"
		description = "Identify Dexter POSGrabber"

	strings:
		$s1 = "UpdateMutex:"
		$s2 = "response="
		$s3 = "page="
		$s4 = "scanin:"

	condition:
		all of them
}
